issue: exported component with no permission protection

details.reason: Exported activity 'com.mobzapp.screenstream.utils.oauth.TwitchRedirectUriReceiverActivity' requires no permission — any third-party app can invoke it directly.

issue: exported component handles sensitive intent actions

details.reason: Activity 'com.mobzapp.screenstream.utils.oauth.TwitchRedirectUriReceiverActivity' is reachable from other apps and handles sensitive system intent actions. Verify that all incoming Intent data is validated before use.

issue: deep-link activity with custom URI scheme and no permission

details.reason: Activity 'com.mobzapp.screenstream.utils.oauth.TwitchRedirectUriReceiverActivity' registers the custom URI scheme 'com.mobzapp.screenstream.trial.twitch://' without a permission guard. Any app can trigger this activity by crafting an Intent with a matching URI.
